reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and especially since all the service points are open, which speeds up the waiting time.

reviews.comment:
Muy organizada la atención. Todos con barbijo. Trato amable y poca espera enn dia lunes a la tarde temprano.
Hay que buscar horarios de poca concurrencia.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very organized. Everyone was wearing a mask. Friendly staff and minimal wait time, even on a Monday afternoon. It's best to go when it's less busy.

reviews.comment:
La atención excelente el único problema fue que un cliente en una moto BMW estaba sin barbijo y el empleado le dijo que se pusiera el mismo y el cliente indignado le faltó el respeto de muy mal modo y el policía no actuó. Para qué ponen un agente si no cumple con su función

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent. The only problem was that a customer on a BMW motorcycle wasn't wearing a mask. The employee told him to put it on. The customer, outraged, was very rude and disrespectful, so the officer didn't act. Why hire an officer if he doesn't do his job?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLbU9qZ1BREAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio del A.C.A. y le dije al playero y le mostré el carnet y no me hizo el descuento del 5% para socios y reclamé por teléfono al 0800 y me dijeron que iban a averiguar que había pasado y avisarme, todavía estoy esperando el llamado, me extraña esta actitud del A.C.A.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member of the A.C.A. and I told the gas station attendant and showed him my membership card, but he didn't give me the 5% member discount. I complained by phone at 0800 and they told me they would look into what happened and get back to me. I'm still waiting for their call. I find this attitude from the A.C.A. strange.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLNkpHeW9RRRAB
